name: daily life of a retierd man
overview: The events revolve around Abu Saleh, the municipal controller who retires from Amma because of his desire to try entrepreneurship. He works with his friend Abu Ahmed on several projects, but they are all failed, and with the succession of events, Abu Saleh decides to return to his previous job.

trailers.title: مسلسل يوميات متقاعد غانم الصالح خليل اسماعيل الحلقة الأولى
